title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, UI
scenario: When notifications are denied during onboarding, the master toggle in App Settings > General is OFF and all individual notification toggles are greyed out and disabled.
steps: 1. Open the app and go through the onboarding process.
2. When prompted for notification permissions, do NOT allow notifications (deny/decline).
6. Observe the master toggle for notifications.
expected: The master toggle in the Notifications section is set to OFF. All individual notification toggles are greyed out and set to OFF, and the user cannot change any of them.
